Change Plan + ADR templates owned. Story §3 (code module-level + aggregate + API + 빅데이터 OLAP) / §7 (incl. §7.4 운영리스크) / §8 (incl. §8.5 stateful + §8.6 contract testing) / §11 데이터 마이그레이션 (RDB OLTP AggregateArch primary / 빅데이터 OLAP DataArch primary, incl. §11.6 idempotency AggregateArch primary) / §13 production evidence quad mirror self-write. codeforge core 의존. + CFP-1086 Story-4 (2026-05-20) — ArchitectAgent.md §'Chief 통합 mechanism' + §'Chief tie-break ladder' + §'Wording SSOT advocate' body implement (ADR-068 Amendment 2 chief author implementation — multi-source synthesis 4 단계 + ladder 3 단계 RACI lookup → invariant 적용 → chief judgement + ADR Amendment 발의 + verdict packet binding boundary_completeness_self_check_passed scope expansion). docs/architecture/codeforge-design.md §'mctrader 5 repo cross-layer evidence' section P4 carrier (5 repo dependency 그래프 market[-bithumb] → engine/web → data + axis mapping APIContractArch primary / AggregateArch primary RDB OLTP / DataArch primary 빅데이터 OLAP / ModuleArch primary 5 repo cross-module + cross-layer ELT/ETL/CDC AggregateArch + DataArch co-author + 4-way RACI matrix Story-3 carrier cross-ref + chief tie-break ladder mctrader scenario sample + anti-scope guard 4종 준수 declare). 0.16.0 = parallel sibling Story-3 점유 — S4 preemptive bump to 0.17.0. doc-only fast-path ADR-054 Category 2. + CFP-1086 Story-2 (2026-05-20) — APIContractArchitectAgent mandate body 심화 codify: 5 영역 full body (1. Transport semantics REST/GraphQL/gRPC/WebSocket 6 axis × 4 transport decision matrix · 2. API versioning 3-axis URI/Header/Query + semver alignment + deprecation policy + GraphQL schema evolution · 3. DTO contract shape definition + nullable/optional/required 4 상태 + validation rule 9 primitive + RFC 7807 error contract + DTO ↔ entity mapper co-author · 4. OpenAPI 3.1 + GraphQL SDL code-first/spec-first + tooling ecosystem + schema versioning + drift detection · 5. Contract testing 3 paradigm Pact consumer-driven + Spring Cloud Contract provider-driven + Schemathesis schema-based + CI integration), S1 skeleton 위 full body 작성, 적극적 이의 제기 12 사유 codify, Out of scope boundary 강화 (R(AggregateArch primary persistence) + R(APIContractArch primary DTO shape) co-author). doc-only fast-path ADR-054 Category 2. + CFP-1086 Story-1 (2026-05-20) — BackendArchEpic Phase 2 design lane 7+3+1 roster 재편 atomic activation: AggregateArchitect 신설 (Sonnet single-mandate — RDB OLTP aggregate invariant + 트랜잭션 경계 + persistence-bound + Alembic 정책 7 원칙 + CONDITIONAL applicability P2 project.yaml aggregate_arch.applicable); APIContractArchitect 신설 (Sonnet single-mandate skeleton at S1 / body 심화 S2 — REST/GraphQL/gRPC/WebSocket + DTO + OpenAPI/GraphQL + contract testing); CodeArchitect → ModuleArchitect rename + mandate 정정 (axis 명확화 — module/package boundary + dependency direction + DDD bounded context module placement 만, 도메인 모델 invariant 영역 AggregateArch 분리); DataArchitect mandate 축소 (RDB OLTP 영역 제거 → 빅데이터 OLAP only: Parquet/객체저장소/DuckDB/streaming/백필/시계열 집계); chief tie-break ladder 3 단계 (ADR-068 Amendment 2 — RACI lookup → ADR-068 invariant → chief judgement + ADR Amendment 발의); Deputy 신설 결정 framework P7 (ADR-086 신설 — axis 분석 + 5-checklist + deferred carrier path). ADR-042 Amendment 8 + ADR-068 Amendment 2 + ADR-086 cross-repo sibling sync. + CFP-1026 S3 (2026-05-20) — design lane agent 구조 재편 atomic activation: DataMigrationArchitect → DataArchitect rename + mandate 확장 (§3 data + §11 전체); OperationalRiskArchitect → InfraOperationalArchitect rename (§7.4 primary 6-sub, ProductionEvidence disjoint axis); CodeArchitect 신설 (Sonnet, §3 code single-mandate advocacy); ArchitectAnalyst 신설 (Sonnet, 4-tuple sub-tuple component, PriorArtAgent conceptual rename); ProductionEvidenceDeputy 신설 (CONDITIONAL production cutover, ADR-72). ADR-042 Amendment 7 + ADR-014 Amendment 4 + ADR-72 cross-repo sibling sync.
